final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing UI design system in a classic minimalist tech style, for web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: UI design system, classic minimalist tech aesthetic, design tokens and component library
Composition: multi-panel component showcase with Dashboard layout, mobile screen mockups, card variations, button states, and control elements arranged in a systematic grid
Subject: web Dashboard interface, mobile app interface, card components, button components, form controls, navigation elements
Scene/backdrop: neutral gray canvas with subtle grid system, component spacing guides visible
Lighting/mood: clean, precise, futuristic tech atmosphere with depth and hierarchy
Color palette: cool grays, electric blues, accent cyan, high contrast for accessibility
Materials/textures: glass-morphism surfaces, subtle gradients, crisp edges, soft shadows for depth
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must demonstrate consistent spacing, typography scale, and component states; all elements must be scalable and reusable
Avoid: cluttered layouts, excessive decoration, clashing color schemes, skeuomorphic textures
